name: Shannon's Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Shannon's Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop in Fort Worth, Texas offering collateral-based loans in exchange for jewelry, valuables, and personal items.
description_long:
Shannon's Jewelry & Loan operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 3728 E Rosedale St in Fort Worth, Texas 76105. The business has been listed on FindAPawnShop.com, a directory dedicated to connecting consumers with pawn shops and collateral-based lending services in their area.

The company offers pawn shop services, which typically include providing loans in exchange for personal collateral such as jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables. Customers can leverage items they own to obtain quick cash without undergoing traditional credit checks or lengthy approval processes. The business also engages in the buying and selling of jewelry and other goods, as is standard in the pawn industry.

Shannon's Jewelry & Loan distinguishes itself by specializing in jewelry-related transactions, as reflected in its name. The business maintains consistent operating hours (Monday–Wednesday: 9AM–6PM based on available data) and provides direct phone contact for customer inquiries. The location in Fort Worth serves the local community's collateral-based lending and jewelry sales needs.

The business currently holds a 2-star rating based on 4 Google reviews on FindAPawnShop.com. This below-average rating suggests potential concerns regarding customer satisfaction, service quality, or pricing. Prospective customers should review individual feedback carefully and compare offerings with other pawn shops in the Fort Worth area before conducting transactions.

diagnosis: Shannon's Jewelry & Loan is best for Fort Worth consumers who own jewelry or valuables and need immediate cash without credit approval, but the 2-star rating warrants caution. Prospective borrowers should verify current terms, interest rates, and redemption policies directly and compare with competing pawn shops before pledging collateral.
